title: Money, Money, Money
meaning_summary: Money, Money, Money keeps earning as a recognizable ABBA catalog track with strong title recall and recurring placement in pop, retro, and musical-adjacent listening.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate is modeled from ABBA catalog replay, evergreen pop demand, and publishing-linked value.

ownership.catalog_sale_status: not modeled as a fully sold song position
ownership.notes: ABBA catalog value is unusually durable because performance, writing, and catalog identity reinforce each other.
